programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Teams answer questions to earn time and advantages over their competitors before going on a supermarket shopping spree; the team that adds the most valuable items to its cart wins.

programme.title: Jack White - Live at iTunes Festival
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007.

programme.title: Scorpions - Forever And A Day: Live In Munich
programme.desc: After 50 years on stages all around the world, Germany's Scorpions decided it was time to embark on one last tour. This fully authorized documentary follows the hard rockers from their beginnings as young music fans to the present day.

programme.title: Jimi Hendrix - Plays Berkeley
programme.desc: This expanded edition of Jimi Plays Berkeley showcases some of the guitarist's finest performances, captured May 30, 1970, at two concerts at the Berkeley Community Theatre.

programme.title: John Mayall - 70th Birthday Concert
programme.desc: Liverpools Kings Dock on July 19 2003 was the venue for a long awaited and much anticipated reunion between Eric Clapton and John Mayall & the Bluesbreakers. The occasion was both a celebration of John Mayalls 70th year and a fundraiser for Unicef.

programme.title: ZZ Top - Live at Montreux
programme.desc: ZZ Top has made a number of visits to Montreux and this concert from 2013 is undoubtedly one of their finest live performances. The set list blends tracks from early seventies through their eighties blockbuster period and up to their most recent rele...

programme.title: Depeche Mode - Rock Am Ring
programme.desc: Rock Am Ring and Rock Im Park are annual music festivals at the Nürburgring racetrack in western Germany; Depeche Mode performs at the event.

programme.title: The Cure - Eurockéennes 2012
programme.desc: The legendary rock band The Cure hits the stage at Eurockéennes in Belfort, in 2012.

programme.title: Qello Concerts' Best
programme.desc: The best of Qello Concerts.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Hendrix (2000)
programme.desc: On stage, Jimi Hendrix (Wood Harris) electrified audiences with his powerful guitar playing and mesmerizing performances. But behind the scenes -- fueled by a dark haze of drugs and alcohol -- this rising star was on a crash course with destiny.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Legend
programme.desc: This film comprehensively reviews the music, the circumstances surrounding its creation and the people behind Legend.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: The sixth episode tells the story of Long Beach rapper, DW Flame. After spending 18 months in jail, DW was exonerated and attacked the vocal booth with renewed hunger, detailing the adversities he had overcome.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Jilly has all the makings of a star. We explore the challenges she faced thus far in the music industry and see how her determination is respected in the music space.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: TRAETWOTHREE is ready to show the world he is the next superstar out of South Central, blending dusky R&B, hip-hop swagger, and West Coast spirit.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon introduces the world to his new R&B boy band, Pop Money. We'll witness the highs and lows of the band's first tour as well as their initial success as they release their debut EP.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Future Superstars
programme.desc: Nick Cannon sits down with VIBE editor-in-chief Datwon Thomas to make their predictions for the season 1 artists and where their careers will take them.

programme.title: Nas: Time is Illmatic (Giant)
programme.desc: The story behind Nas's groundbreaking debut album 'Illmatic,' and the early life of one of the most talented rappers of all time. Featuring Pharrell Williams, Alicia Keys, Q-Tip, and Busta Rhymes.

programme.title: Music Talks: Nas
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Nasir Jones (Nas) for an inside look into his journey in the music industry, his philanthropy, and the arts.

programme.title: Music Talks: Queen Latifah
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Queen Latifah for an inside look at her journey through the avenues of the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: Johnny Mathis: In Concert
programme.desc: Johnny Mathis is one of a handful of artists who truly deserves a legendary status. Since his impact on scene in the 1950s, Johnny has maintained a high levels of performance, both on recordings and on stage.

programme.title: Janet Jackson: In Control
programme.desc: She may have been the youngest of 10 of the Jackson children, but that did not stop Janet Jackson from embracing her own identity. Her unquestioned talent has built an empire of success as Ms. Janet remains In Control.

programme.title: Larry King Now: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Music superstar Wiz Khalifa gives Larry a lesson in hip-hop culture and shares his excitement over soon becoming a dad. Plus, the tattooed rapper offers Larry some pointers on getting inked.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The mysterious night sky is pierced by amazing lunar rays which Bob Ross uses to illuminate a mighty mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Enjoy this fascinating experience of watching Bob Ross bring these deep dark woods alive; incredible magic on a partial black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross gently places a little old church house upon a bed of snow in front of giant frost-covered mountains in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross into an evening display of glowing, magnificent setting sun. Another unique oval painting you'll have to see.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross puts a lonesome cabin in the middle of a snowy setting as an unexpected place of respite for the weary traveler.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross chooses to make a pond in the middle of a darkened forest the subject of today's mood-evoking creation.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross as he paints a lovely scenic mountain surrounded by quiet, soft, misty foothills - a beautiful painting that even a beginner can do with ease!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes - brr!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a spectacular mountain scene in a faux matte; a real masterpiece cleverly framed in an intriguing new idea!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs a unique technique, using both black and white basecoats, to create a happy little stream tumbling down a rocky meadow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a gorgeous late-afternoon mountain masterpiece by Bob Ross -- breathtaking purples skies, defined evergreens, and smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Leisurely stroll along the beach and breaking wave with Bob Ross and experience the calm of day's end under a colorful setting sun … in an oval!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll with Bob Ross, down to that perfect little fishing spot tucked away from the world, and relish the beauty of the day!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this dark breathtaking scene, Bob Ross creates an almost calm night with waves crashing against rocks and a protective lighthouse.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Gently rolling mountains make an amazing backdrop for this Bob Ross masterpiece; a winding stream and textured ground vegetation provide the rest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Snow-covered trees and shrubs appear to be dressed in finest lace among the soft glows of winter. A unique Bob Ross painting!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: This beautiful lake in the glen will leave you fully rested and at peace with the world; Bob Ross creates a quiet mountain masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A real Bob Ross classic - the majestic snow-covered mountain, rolling foothills, leafy trees and bushes, and serene lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a still lake that captures the reflection of some trees as a range of rugged mountains stand guard in the background.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A beautiful mountain painting in an oval - with a surprising twist! - as Bob Ross creates a lonely cabin embraced by lovely lacy bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The day's sun is almost gone, but Bob Ross finds what's left of it in this unusual blend of late afternoon tones.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Palm trees sway in the warm breeze as Bob Ross teaches us to paint a beautiful, sunny exotic little ocean masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Stand back in the shadows with Bob Ross as the last rays of sunshine sparkle on all they touch in this lovely waterside oval on black canvas.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feel the soft coolness of late summer air and drink in the beauty of changing colors with Bob Ross as he creates this refreshing masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a secluded waterfall deep in the mountains, standing tall and proud. This magnificent scene instills comfort and joy.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a fantastic and truly unique geometric illusion of depth in today's lovely vision of pastel mountain magic.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft misty background, sweet snow-kissed cabin, and rich trees and bushes - all nestled down inside a winter oval painting by Bob Ross.

programme.title: Julia at Home

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Mayor La Guardia fights the mob over artichokes, Julia Child meets the love of her life while working as a spy, and a molasses flood devastates Boston. Featuring Michael McKean, Joe Lo Truglio, Kevin Pollak, Samm Levine, Jason Ritter and Michaela Watkins.

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Drunk History

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: The Ghost Army tricks German troops, a resistance movement grows within Japanese internment camps, and Adolf Hitler's nephew fights for the U.S. Featuring Randall Park, Lyric Lewis, Jack McBrayer and Aaron Takahashi.

programme.title: Daria
programme.desc: The Morgendorffers reluctantly attend a family wedding in which Daria and Quinn are bridesmaids, and Daria finds something in common with her Aunt Amy.

programme.desc: Helen and Jake realize how much they've changed while spending a weekend with their friends from college, and Jane and Daria join Trent on a trip to the flea market.

programme.title: Daria

programme.desc: A high school senior named Sue and her boyfriend want to get married right after Sue graduates. A marriage counselor discourages the young couple from entering into a hasty marriage.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble, pursued by the local police, takes refuge with a widow and her young son and makes an enemy of her suitor.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble calls on Dr. McAllister, a former mentor, and finds the old gentleman in the hospital both physically and mentally ill.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver is called on to investigate the kidnapping of a wealthy industrialist's daughter.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver has a ghostly encounter while fighting for his life in a hospital bed.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While on jury duty for a murder trial, MacGyver takes matters into his own hands and uncovers some startling evidence in support of the defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Community General is already under increased security, with a high-profile criminal hospitalized, when an important businesswoman is brought in. Mark suspects her security guard has deadly intentions.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse's new part-time job as a trainer of the pro basketball Mustangs turns deadly when he's accused of murdering a star player.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a plastic surgeon when an actress's death apparently results from an infection contracted during surgery.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Windom Earle has taken his first victim in the deadly chess game. Audrey tells Bobby they have to save Ben from his civil war fantasy. Leo awakes and attacks Shelly, but Bobby is able to fend him off.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: The police look for James in the Marsh murder. Bobby and Shelly tell Truman Leo escaped and Bobby reveals that he saw Hank shoot Leo the night the mill burned. Albert returns to Twin Peaks with information on Windom Earle.

programme.title: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: Truman puts Hank in prison for the attempted murder of Leo, while Hank points the finger at Josie for the murder of Andrew Packard. Albert reveals that Josie shot Cooper. Ben enlists John Justice Wheeler to help him stop the Ghostwood plans.

programme.title: Hunter

programme.title: The Parallax View
programme.desc: Warren Beatty is a news reporter who, along with seven others, witnesses the assassination of a political candidate.

programme.title: White Lightning

programme.title: Death Wish

programme.title: Rolling Thunder

programme.title: The Parallax View
programme.desc: Warren Beatty is a news reporter who, along with seven others, witnesses the assassination of a political candidate.

programme.title: The Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Under the inimitable direction of Robert Altman, Elliot Gould stars as the laid-back, legendary private eye Philip Marlowe investigating a mysterious murder. Also stars Sterling Hayden and Nina Van Pallandt.

programme.title: Big
programme.desc: In this heartfelt comedy starring Tom Hanks, a young boy discovers adulthood isn't all it's cracked up to be when his wish to be a grown-up magically comes true.

programme.title: Summer Rental
programme.desc: Comedy sensation John Candy plays the stressed-out air traffic controller whose much-needed family holiday yields one hysterical misadventure after another.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: High school senior, Ferris Bueller, decides to cut school and is determined to experience a day of pure freedom with his girlfriend and best friend in downtown Chicago before graduating.

programme.title: Footloose

programme.title: Pretty In Pink

programme.title: Coneheads

programme.title: The Big Hit

programme.title: Bound
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Eagle Eye
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: Strategic Air Command
programme.desc: Aviation and sports come together as a baseball player is recalled to Air Force duty.

programme.title: Battle of Britain

programme.title: When Worlds Collide

programme.desc: An unspeakable horror! Extraterrestrial terror is on the hunt for human flesh in this horrifying tale of invasion! This is a 1950s creature-feature with some serious sociological bite! Paul Birch, Lorna Thayer, and Richard Sargent star!

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: The Beautician and The Beast
programme.desc: A New York cosmetologist mistakenly thought to be a science teacher is offered a job to teach the children of an Eastern European dictator.

programme.title: Soapdish

programme.desc: Reese Witherspoon plays Tracy Flick, a straight-A go-getter determined to be president of Carver High’s student body. Popular teacher Jim McAllister (Broderick) decides to derail Tracy’s obsessive overachieving by recruiting an opposition candidate.

programme.title: Morning Glory

programme.desc: A has-been actor tries to convince the perfect woman to play Samantha in an adaptation of the classic TV series; a woman who, unbeknownst to him, really is a witch!

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: Two figure skating rivals are banned from the sport after a brawl over the gold medal. Joining forces, they find a loophole in the rules that allows them to skate again... as a pair!

programme.desc: Enter the world of 1970s TV news, where Ron Burgundy and his loyal Channel 4 News Team are San Diego's #1 rated news source. All is well in their male-dominated world of news until rising star reporter Veronica Corningstone turns it upside down.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: The wait is over, America -- Ron Burgundy is back! After losing his job, Ron reassembles the news team and squares off against a new rival in the comedy that critics are calling one of the funniest movies of the year!

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: Three men are disenchanted with life and try to recapture their college days.

programme.title: Dreamland

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan

programme.title: Hamburger Hill

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A cage fighter struggling to deal with a tragic loss comes to the rescue of a Chinese girl being targeted by the Russian mafia. He vows to help her and sets out to uncover the truth behind her connection to the gangsters.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Uncut Gems
programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler (Adam Sandler) makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime.

programme.title: Air Force One

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: The Gambler
programme.desc: Jim Bennett (Mark Wahlberg) is a professor leading a double life as a high-stakes gambler. When he borrows money from dangerous gangsters, he places the lives of his loved ones in mortal danger and must risk everything to keep from losing it all.

programme.title: Mid-Century
programme.desc: Academy Award Nominee Bruce Dern and Stephen Lang star in this horror tale about a couple renting a vacation home who meet the spirits of the architect and his two wives—plus their deranged, living son.

programme.desc: A musician couple captures a sound not meant for human ears. Soon, a stranger knocks on their door and their reality begins to blur.

programme.title: Pet Sematary

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Grey Owl

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to America's most haunted city, New Orleans, to investigate the Old U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Frozen in Fear

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Prospect, Maine to investigate Fort Knox, built before the Civil War to protect the Penobscot narrows.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, Tapsheads to Derby, Connecticut to investigate one of the country's oldest Opera houses, the Sterling Opera House.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Urgent!

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Hill View Manor

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghostly Evidence
programme.desc: A mother's suicide tortures four generations of one family.
